pr.title: Rename grstadium to grpstadium for asserts and clean them up, permuter match a function
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Renamed the Pokemon Stadium ground module from grstadium to grpstadium so file/assert paths line up with the embedded grpstadium.c strings, updated build/split/include references, and cleaned repeated manual asserts into HSD_ASSERT calls. The PR also named TextWrapper HSD_Text pointers as win_static_p/win_dynamic_p and permuter-matched grStadium_801D3138, with decomp.dev reporting a net +408 matched bytes.
what_changed: Renamed src/melee/gr/grstadium.c to src/melee/gr/grpstadium.c and src/melee/gr/grstadium.h to src/melee/gr/grpstadium.h; the old TODO saying the file needed to be named grpstadium.c for asserts was removed.
Updated config/GALE01/splits.txt and configure.py from melee/gr/grstadium.c to melee/gr/grpstadium.c.
Updated include users in ftPr_SpecialHi.c, gm_16AE.c, and ground.c from grstadium.h to grpstadium.h.
Changed grStadium_801D10F8's OSReport path argument from the literal grpstadium.c to __FILE__.
Converted many manual `if (...) __assert("grpstadium.c", line, "expr")` blocks to `HSD_ASSERT(line, expr)` while preserving line constants.
Renamed TextWrapper fields x18 and x1C to win_static_p and win_dynamic_p and propagated those names through HSD_SisLib calls.
Adjusted grStadium_801D3138's local/decomp shape; decomp.dev listed main/melee/gr/grpstadium grStadium_801D3138 as a +408-byte 100% match.
smart_moves: Fixed the module's physical filename instead of continuing to hardcode grpstadium.c in asserts, making __FILE__ and HSD_ASSERT usable.
Used existing assert expression strings as naming evidence: old asserts referenced gp2->win_static_p and gp2->win_dynamic_p even while the struct fields were still x18/x1C.
Performed the rename atomically across splits.txt, configure.py, the C file, the header, and direct include users.
Kept public/internal function names like grStadium_801D3138 unchanged while changing only the file/header identity to grpstadium, avoiding unnecessary symbol churn.
Interpreted matching output as rename churn plus one real gain: the bot showed 74 new matches and 73 broken matches due to the unit path move, with net +408 matched bytes.
decomp_lessons: Original assert file strings can require repository filenames to match exactly; once the file is correctly named, prefer HSD_ASSERT/__FILE__ over duplicated string literals.
Assert expression text is strong semantic evidence for struct fields and local roles, especially when it names fields not yet represented in the decompiled struct.
When cleaning assert blocks, preserve original line constants such as 0x6D2, 0x780, 0x969, and 0xA44 to keep behavior and matching stable.
File/module renames can dominate decomp.dev reports; compare old and new unit names and look for the net byte delta before claiming broad new matching progress.
Permuter-derived no-op or odd-looking code-shape artifacts can be a valid matching tactic, but should remain easy to search and revisit.
naming_conventions: Use grpstadium.c/grpstadium.h and build path melee/gr/grpstadium.c for the Pokemon Stadium ground module, while retaining the existing grStadium_* function prefix.
TextWrapper.win_static_p names the static SIS text/window pointer initialized by HSD_SisLib_803A5ACC.
TextWrapper.win_dynamic_p names the dynamic HSD_Text pointer initialized by HSD_SisLib_803A6754.
Readable locals such as map_gobj, text_gobj, gp, and gp2 replaced temp_rXX names where object roles were clear from surrounding asserts.
Resource casing SIS_GrPStadiumData aligns with the GrPStadium/grpstadium module spelling.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: The title attributes a function match to the permuter; the diff shows grStadium_801D3138 changed local declaration order and inserted an empty `if ((jobj->flags && jobj->flags)) {}` before the mobj NULL check.
HSD_ASSERT replacements removed explicit compare/branch/__assert boilerplate while keeping line-number operands intact.
After the physical rename, `OSReport(..., __FILE__, 0x120, id)` replaced a literal file string without needing a bespoke hardcoded path.
Decomp.dev reported GALE01 matched code at 55.56% (+0.01%, +408 bytes); most per-function new/broken entries were the grstadium-to-grpstadium unit rename.
review_feedback: No human reviews or review comments were present in the slice.

The decomp.dev bot reported 74 new matches under main/melee/gr/grpstadium and 73 broken matches under main/melee/gr/grstadium, indicating mostly rename attribution churn plus the net +408-byte improvement.
follow_up_queries: Search for remaining grstadium path/include/assert strings after the rename.
Find later grpstadium PRs that finish near-matches such as grStadium_801D4548, grStadium_801D3BBC, grStadium_801D435C, and grStadium_801D2A60.
Audit other ground files for hardcoded assert filename literals or TODOs that can be fixed by renaming the file and using HSD_ASSERT.
Revisit the empty `if ((jobj->flags && jobj->flags)) {}` in grStadium_801D3138 if a clearer matching construct becomes known.
